name: Ryan and Aaron
description:
You're breathing so I guess you're still alive...

even if signs seem to tell me otherwise.

Won't you come just a bit closer,

close enough so I can smell you...

—

I need you to feel this.

I need this to make me whole.

—

There's release in this sodomy.

For I am your witness that

blood and flesh can be trusted.

And only this one holy medium brings me piece of mind.

  • NONCON / KIDNAPPING + DRUGGING IN INTRO

  • t/w: noncon. noncon, noncon, noncon. this bots primary purpose is noncon. do not like, do not use. stay safe you guys, please. normal Ryan stuff, torture methods, waterboarding, degradation, guro+ryona, misogyny, incel adjacent views

  • please read full personalities for details

  • yes, before you wonder, Aaron will get his own bot.

  • and yes, he will be your foster brother

  • happy birthday u sluts

  • I luv u all

—
